DISCOVERY 612, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL POST JUDGMENT DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $301.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Appearance:
Defendant David Ciapponi appearing in propria persona

Ruling:
Tentative Ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Post Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $301.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
